Pace v1.0.7

What’s new:

- Added motivational completion toasts with non-repeating quote rotation.
- Introduced elite challenge Easter Eggs: one secret unlock day per month across 12 months.
- Added Celestial Vault meta trophy for collecting all 12 monthly eggs.
- Added Easter Egg gallery with month-specific custom artwork and unique visual themes.
- Added radar hints toggle for elite egg discovery flow.
- Added unlock polish: fresh egg reveal animation and temporary NEW badge.
- Standardized SnackBars as floating/nav-safe so toasts never render behind bottom navigation.
- Improved update release notes retrieval with layered fallbacks:
  - GitHub release body
  - annotated tag message
  - generated fallback summary
- Updated release workflow to guarantee non-null release body via body_path and notes generation fallback.
